title: Soul Fire'd

![Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/github/issues.svg)[![GitHub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/github/github.svg)](https://github.com/crystal-nest/soul-fire-d/issues) --- ## 📝 **Description** Ever noticed how Soul Fire in Minecraft looks unique, but doesn't act differently from regular fire? **Soul Fire'd** fixes that, making Soul Fire behave exactly as you'd expect! This mod ensures that **Soul Fire has distinct behaviors**, including special damage effects, custom enchantments, and more. > ⚠️ **Important**: Soul Fire'd must be installed on **both client and server**, as it introduces substantial gameplay changes, not just visuals. [![Minecraft Storage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/soul-fire-d/minecraft-storage-banner.png "Minecraft Storage")](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/soul-fired?ref=crystal-nest) ## ✨ **Features** - 🔵 **Soul Fire overlay** ![Overlay](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/soul-fire-d/overlay.gif) *Prefer a slimmer version? Check out [Slim Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/slim-fire)!* - 🔥 **Consistent Soul Fire damage** Entities catching Soul Fire burn visibly blue and take 2 damage per second. ![Sheep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/soul-fire-d/sheep.gif) - 🎯 **Consistent Soul Fire mechanics** For instance, but not limited to, zombies burning from Soul Fire and arrows passing through Soul Fire can set their targets on Soul Fire. ![Arrows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crystal-nest/mod-fancy-assets/main/soul-fire-d/arrow.gif) - 📚 **New enchantments: Soul Fire Aspect & Soul Flame.** Similar to Fire Aspect and Flame enchantments, but applying Soul Fire instead, causing additional damage. Both these enchantments can be highly configured individually, enabling (default) or disabling them and more. *Configuration is done via datapack since `1.21`* ## 🤝 **Compatibilities** Mods fully integrated with Soul Fire'd: | Mod | Loader | |:-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:------:| | [Tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra) with [Tetracelium](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetracelium) | All | | [Decorative Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-blocks) | All | | [Alex's Mobs Interaction](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs-interaction) | All | | [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) | All | | [Infernal Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/infernal-expansion) | All | Want your mod listed here? Submit an issue [here](https://github.com/Crystal-Nest/soul-fire-d/issues/new?assignees=Crystal-Spider&labels=question%2Cmedium+priority&projects=&template=information_request.yml) and provide a link to your mod! ## 🔗 **Dependencies** | Mod | Loader | Requirement | |:------------------------------------------------------|:----------------------:|:----------------:| | [Cobweb](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobweb) | All | Required | | [Prometheus](https://modrinth.com/mod/promehteus-api) | All | Required | ## 📜 **License and right of use** Feel free to use this mod for any modpack or video, just be sure to give credit and possibly link [here](https://github.com/crystal-nest/soul-fire-d#readme). This project is published under the [Crystal Nest Community License v1](https://github.com/crystal-nest/soul-fire-d/blob/master/LICENSE). ## 💻 **For developers** Since **v6.0.0**, the API has been moved to [Prometheus](https://modrinth.com/mod/prometheus). Learn how to integrate custom fire types and utilize the provided API through detailed documentation: - 📖 [API Wiki](https://github.com/crystal-nest/prometheus/wiki) - 📘 [Datapack Integration Wiki](https://github.com/crystal-nest/prometheus/wiki/Data-Driven-Fires) ## ❤️ **Support us** [![Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/d559b544-474c-4109-b861-1b2e6ca6026a.webp "Bisect Hosting")](https://bisecthosting.com/crystalspider)
